examination.text: Supports structured adult panic-disorder diagnosis, history, comorbidity review, panic presentations, and proportionate investigation to exclude acute physical problems before primary-care follow-up.

source_limitations: Palpitations, breathlessness, chest tightness, trembling, sweating, dizziness, syncope, focal neurological symptoms, psychosis, detailed mental-status fields, named screening tools, ECG, thyroid or blood testing, grounding techniques, and fixed one-to-two-week review remain unsupported.
Panic diagnosis, physical exclusion, risk, and treatment remain clinician-stated.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
